title: phyllanthus carunculatus
intro: Phyllanthus carunculatus is a plant species that belongs to the Phyllanthaceae family, commonly known as the Malpighiaceae family in some parts of the world. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to support liver health and aid in the treatment of various liver disorders, such as hepatitis. The health benefits of Phyllanthus carunculatus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. In traditional medicine, Phyllanthus carunculatus is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is used to treat a range of ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
